message:
feat(demo_showcase): add semantic tokens and shared style helpers

Implements bd-3mh2: theme module with comprehensive styling foundation.

Spacing module:
- XS/SM/MD/LG/XL constants (1/2/4/6/8 units)
- SIDEBAR_WIDTH, MIN_CONTENT_WIDTH, HEADER/FOOTER_HEIGHT

Typography helpers:
- title_style, heading_style, subheading_style
- muted_style, link_style, shortcut_style

Status helpers:
- success_style, warning_style, error_style, info_style
- status_style(bool), progress_style(percent)

Container helpers:
- box_style, box_focused_style, card_style
- panel_style, modal_style, table_style

Interactive element helpers:
- badge_style, badge_primary_style
- button_style, button_primary_style
- hover_style, selected_style

App chrome helpers:
- header_style, footer_style
- sidebar_style, sidebar_selected_style, sidebar_inactive_style

All styles follow VISUAL_DESIGN.md specification.
Tests included for spacing ordering and theme roundtrips.

Unblocks: bd-2k35, bd-32pp, bd-13np, bd-3s4n

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
